name: Cement Mortar Calculator
seo_description: Calculate cement mortar volume, cement weight, sand and water for screeds and leveling. Free calculator.
example_label: Calculate mortar for a floor screed of 40m² with 3cm thickness and 350 kg/m³ cement dosage.

range_hints.area: Surface area to cover with mortar
range_hints.dosificacion: Lean: 250 kg/m³, Standard: 350 kg/m³, Rich: 450 kg/m³

result_context: For {area} m² at {espesor_cm}cm thickness: {vol_m3} m³ mortar, {cemento_kg} kg cement ({sacos_50kg} bags) and {arena_m3} m³ sand.
formula_display: Volume = Area x Thickness_m; Cement = Volume x Dosage; Sand = Volume x 1.1
steps: Calculate cement: 1.2m³ x 350 kg/m³ = 420 kg (8.4 bags)
mistakes: Using incorrect cement dosage for the type of work
Not accounting for mortar compaction waste
Mixing sand with too much water (reduces strength)
description: Cement Mortar Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Cement Mortar Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
